node.title: Uber | Confluent | Roller Coaster Job Search Journey | SDE 3

topic.title: Uber | Confluent | Roller Coaster Job Search Journey | SDE 3

post.content:
Hey folks,

I am writing this to help the community which i benefited from drastically.
My company shut down. I started my job search for SDE 3 in **India**.
I was fortunate to get some offers. I interviewed in a timeline of 1.5 month. I gave 80+ interviews. ( Not to confuse with 80 Companies, each company has 5-6 rounds )
**I joined Uber.**

I'll share the interview structure for these.

### Companies i got offer from: 
#### **Confluent**: 
Signed NDA Can't reveal exact questions.

	1) Screening Round. Similar to validate Sudoku with some twist and followup.
	2) DSA Medium.
	3) DSA Medium - Hard : 2 questions
	4) Design Round Standard Design
    5) Hiring manager round.
	
####  **Bitgo**

	1) DSA hard screening round: https://github.com/gutty333/Hard-Programming-Challenges/blob/master/10_CityTraffic.cpp
	2)  Hiring manager round
	3)  HLD Blockchain indexer.   
	4)  LLD : Snake & Ladder
	5)  Culture Fit
	
#### **Uber**
	1) DSA Screening round: 2 Medium-Hard DP questions
	2) DSA Hard: Similar to calculator
	3) LLD: Scheduler
	4) Design: Zomato
	5) Hiring manager call. 1 hour 45 mins.

####  **Coupang**
	1) Total 3 problems:
	  1 DSA : easy - find the biggest element with negative integer
	  1 LLD: Breaker pattern to reduce load on our service
	  1 DSA : medium max sum in contiguous array
	2) Past work discussion + HLD: Ad click aggregator
	3) Hiring Manager
	4) Another Hiring manager. Asked tough questions. Very senior folks 20+ YOE.
In coupang Staff Level interview has 2 hiring manager rounds. For senior they have 1 HM and 1 Barraiser round.

#### Stripe
Signed NDA so can't disclose questions

	1) Screening DSA
	2) DSA
	3) Hiring manager round
	4) Bug Squash: They'll give a code base find bugs.
	5) Design Round
	6) Integration Round: Integrate different APIs to achieve some outcomes.
Stripe's interview the most fun for me and closely related to daily work.

-----

### Companies i was rejected from:
#### Rippling
2 DSA, 1 LLD, 1 HLD, 1 HM
#### Atlassian
2 DSA, 1 SD, 1 HM
#### Coinbase
2 DSA, 1 SD, 1 HM

For above 3 signed NDA so can't disclose questions.
#### Deliveroo
	1) Take home assignment
	2) Design Round Give out 6 million burger
	3) Code round extensions to assignment submitted
	4) HM round

	Very strange that i was rejected. My rounds were super great.

#### Opendoor

	1) Round 1 DSA: KV Store, KV Store with TTL, KV Store with commit rollback
	2) LLD/DSA Excel Question, Implement Get, Set. With followup problem
	3) System Design Round 1: Google calendar  
	4) Hiring Manager
	5) System Design using graphDB.

HR said I did clear all the rounds but I didn't get offer due to "team fitment".

#### Interestingly i had recieved offers from Rippling, Atlassian & Coinbase for SDE 2 roles in last 2 years.

-------


### Companies I opted out of process:
* Docusign
* Agoda
* Prophecy.io
* Many many more don't want to disclose.
-----

My preparation:
1) 200+ LC Medium+Hard
2) 50+ Systed Design ( Alex xu, DDIA , Youtube and more )
3) LLD: Job + Practice on own
4) For concurrency i practiced heavily on my own. You can get top asked questions online.

Don't give up. Keep on working and you'll hit your targets eventually. **RESLIENCEY** is the key.

Do let me know if anyone has any questions. 

Wish you best of luck on your interview journey 😀😀🫡🫡🧿
Congratulations, can you please share the compensation details from the companies you got offer from
I can totally agree with the Stripe Interviews being fun as they test your development skill rather than problem solving skill.

hey op, what is the graphDB system design that opendoor asked?  was it "Design a System to search nearby properties. You are given x,y, and width w and fetch all the nearby properties and describe how will you show it to the end user if the output is very low or high. Discuss Database design, cache, and how to search nearby properties."
hey OP can you message me on discord at chronotrigger3064 i am in final rounds of confluent and Atlassian

Can you dm me on discord (ls_coder_007 is my username)? I want to discuss Stripe compensation. I am expecting an offer(fingers crossed). Or let me know if I can reach out to you to discuss this. Thanks!
How did you balance your preparation for interviews with your full-time job? Can you share your daily/weekly study routine and how long it took you to feel interview-ready?
Howwww??? Just HOWWW? Damn these offers. What\'s more surprising is the interviews you could bag. It\'s hard to come by in this market. Good for you!

For concurrency i practiced heavily on my own. You can get top asked questions online. >>\nhow u practice i  mean making scenarios on own with help of gpt or some standard usecase type how particular system handles some xyz feature at scale like that.
Hey OP, thanks for the motivation and congrats!\nwhat is the graphDB system design that opendoor asked? I am curious as I have never practiced a graphDB question before
Can you share more on concurrency questions, can you share more details on this? which company asked this question and in what way?
Congrats. Can you please add comp offered as well?
Hey, didn\'t Confluent have two design rounds? Which level did you interview for?
